hooks.command: node -e "const{execSync:x}=require('child_process');const P='C:/Users/Nico/Desktop/bricolensai Vclaude';const r=(c)=>{try{return x(c,{cwd:P,encoding:'utf8',timeout:90000}).trim();}catch(e){return e.stdout?.trim()||'ERREUR';}};const lines=[];lines.push('=== MAESTROMIND - Rapport auto ===');lines.push('');lines.push('--- Git Status ---');lines.push(r('git status --short')||'(clean)');lines.push('');lines.push('--- 5 derniers commits ---');lines.push(r('git log --oneline -5'));lines.push('');lines.push('--- Build ---');const b=r('npm run build 2>&1');lines.push(b.includes('built in')?'BUILD: OK':('BUILD ECHEC: '+b.split('\n').slice(-5).join(' ')));lines.push('');lines.push('--- Sante projet ---');const fs=require('fs');const comps=fs.readdirSync(P+'/src/components').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.jsx')).length;const tests=fs.readdirSync(P+'/tests').filter(f=>f.includes('.spec.')).length;lines.push('Composants: '+comps);lines.push('Tests: '+tests);lines.push('dist/: '+(fs.existsSync(P+'/dist')?'OK':'MANQUANT'));lines.push('node_modules: '+(fs.existsSync(P+'/node_modules')?'OK':'MANQUANT'));lines.push('==================================');console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'SessionStart',additionalContext:lines.join('\n')}}));"
